title: DUX v9.5 Problem Object
description: Strategic job-to-be-done defining market-level opportunities - focuses on user motivations and desired outcomes

object_type.description: Object type discriminator - always 'Problem' for Problem objects

job_statement.description: Job-to-be-done statement following the pattern: 'When [situation], I want [motivation], so I can [outcome].'

end_user.description: User personas or roles who experience this problem

what_is_at_stake.description: What users lose or risk if this problem isn't solved

protocol_url.description: URL to protocol, methodology, or research documentation related to this problem

reference_context.description: LLM-generated explanation of why this relationship exists

result_ids.description: Envisioned results from solving this problem

reference_context.description: LLM-generated explanation of why this relationship exists

useroutcome_ids.description: User outcomes that solve this problem

reference_context.description: LLM-generated explanation of why this relationship exists

flow_ids.description: Flows that address how this problem is solved

evidence_maturity.description: Progressive evidence maturity tier: 01_assumptive (inferred, no direct support), 02_anecdotal (1-2 qualitative signals), 03_early_signal (recurring signal, no quant), 04_balanced_signal (qualitative + quantitative), 05_triangulated (cross-method validation)

evidence.description: Array of Provenance object IDs that support this problem's existence and importance

tags.description: System-derived tags generated by NotebookLM DUX scan - not manually set
